items.title: Mass trial for 486 alleged gang members begins in El Salvador
items.dek: Footage released by the attorney general's office shows large groups of men in prison attending the trial via video link.
items.body: Footage released by the attorney general's office shows large groups of men in prison attending the trial via video link.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
items.dek: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.
items.body: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sources: Soto to return to slumping Mets on Wed.
items.dek: The Mets, mired in an 11-game losing streak, will get a boost to their offense with outfielder Juan Soto set to return to the lineup Wednesday, sources told ESP
items.body: The Mets, mired in an 11-game losing streak, will get a boost to their offense with outfielder Juan Soto set to return to the lineup Wednesday, sources told ESPN.
items.author: IriLine Desk
